title: New 3D Torches x Bare Bones!
description: Makes my resource pack called: "New 3D Torches" compability with Bare Bones!
body:
## ⚠️ Warning!
******Original [Resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-torches) by [Waradu](https://modrinth.com/user/Waradu)******

******Bare Bones [Resource pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-torches-bb) by [Kimskaj](https://modrinth.com/user/Kimskaj)******

## ✅ Features:

- _**BB 3D & 2D Torches**_

## 📖 Need to know:
**Dont need [OG](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-torches) or [BB](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/new-torches-bb) resource pack**

******USE WITH [SHADERS](https://modrinth.com/shaders) FOR BEST GAMEPLAY******
